• Let's Learn .NET: Blazor - June 7, 2021 - Blazor lets you build interactive web UIs using C# instead of JavaScript. Blazor apps are composed of reusable web UI components implemented using C#, HTML, and CSS. Both client and server code is written in C#, allowing you to share code and libraries. Together, we will learn all about Blazor and why you would use it to build web apps, and then we will build our first client web app with Blazor and .NET.
